name: Potato Bread with Sour Cream & Chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
This bread tastes just as delicious as it sounds. Savor it with a steak dinner,
fill with homemade beef pate for finger sandwiches; or toast the slices, dust
with garlic salt.
